tables.table_title: Tasks Used to Evaluate the Performance of Large Language Models
data: Language Translation
Translating text from one language to another
Text Summarization
Summarizing a long piece of text into a shorter summary
Question Answering
Answering a question based on a given text
tables.table_note: This table lists the tasks used to evaluate the performance of large language models in multilingual settings.

tables.table_title: Evaluation Metrics Used to Evaluate the Quality of the Output Generated by Large Language Models
data: Accuracy
Measuring the accuracy of the output generated by the model
Fluency
Measuring the fluency of the output generated by the model
tables.table_note: This table lists the evaluation metrics used to assess the quality of outputs generated by large language models.

tables.table_title: Challenges Faced by Large Language Models in Multilingual Settings
data: Language Variation
Dealing with variations in language, such as dialects and idioms
Cultural Differences
Dealing with cultural differences and nuances
Limited Training Data
Dealing with limited training data in multilingual settings
tables.table_note: This table outlines the challenges faced by large language models when applied to multilingual settings.

tables.table_title: Opportunities for Improving the Performance of Large Language Models in Multilingual Settings
data: Multilingual Training
Training models on multiple languages to improve their performance in multilingual settings
Transfer Learning
Using transfer learning to leverage knowledge from one language to improve performance in another language
Human Evaluation
Using human evaluation to improve the quality of the output generated by the model
tables.table_note: This table highlights opportunities for improving the performance of large language models in multilingual contexts.

tables.table_title: Potential Applications of Large Language Models in Multilingual Settings
data: Language Translation
Using large language models for language translation in multilingual settings
Text Summarization
Using large language models for text summarization in multilingual settings
Question Answering
Using large language models for question answering in multilingual settings
tables.table_note: This table lists potential applications of large language models in multilingual environments.
